text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally time. We're moments from Silence
Suzuka's debut race.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: For this race, and for what comes after.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Well, I guess it's time.
